summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of the new Quant Strategies page (/quant-strategies). All features tested and working correctly. No backend testing required as this is a pure frontend static data app.
critical_code_review_comments: React Router future flag warnings in console - consider adding v7_startTransition and v7_relativeSplatPath flags to Router configuration to prepare for React Router v7

success_rate.backend: N/A - No backend for this feature

context_for_next_testing_agent: Quant Strategies page fully tested. All features working: page load, strategy/benchmark checkboxes, date presets (YTD/1Y/3Y/5Y/MAX), log scale toggle, rebase toggle, primary benchmark selector, all 6 chart tabs (Equity Curve, Drawdown, Rolling Sharpe, Risk/Return, Histogram, Metrics Table), Export CSV button, URL state persistence via query params. Home page and About Us page also verified working.

header_navigation.details: QUANT STRATEGIES nav link navigates to /quant-strategies

strategy_checkboxes.details: Dual Momentum and Marot Momentum V2 checkboxes toggle correctly

benchmark_checkboxes.details: S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite checkboxes toggle correctly

date_presets.details: YTD, 1Y, 3Y, 5Y, MAX presets all work and update URL

log_scale_toggle.details: Log Scale toggle works on equity curve chart

primary_benchmark_selector.details: Radio buttons for S&P 500 and Nasdaq work correctly

tab_switching.details: All 6 tabs work: Equity Curve, Drawdown, Rolling Sharpe, Risk/Return, Histogram, Metrics Table

metrics_table_columns.details: All required columns present: CAGR, Total Return, Vol, Sharpe, Sortino, Calmar, Max DD, DD Duration, Best Year, Worst Year, % Pos Months, Beta, Alpha, Corr, TE, IR

export_csv.details: Export CSV button visible, enabled, and clickable

url_state_persistence.details: URL query params update when selections change and restore state on page load
